{{Infobox technique
| name = Star Lance
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Star Lance]] is an orthodox [[Striker technique]] of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Star Lance]] is a technique that sends a beacon of white light into the clouds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] prepares a [[Star Lance]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Star Lance]] is the simplest and fastest [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
